{% set totals = namespace(earn_usd=0.0, earn_zwg=0.0, ded_usd=0.0, ded_zwg=0.0) %} {% set max_length = [doc.employee_earnings|length, doc.employee_deductions|length] | max %} {% for i in range(max_length) %} {# Earnings #} {% if i < doc.employee_earnings|length %} {% set earn = doc.employee_earnings[i] %} {% set totals.earn_usd = totals.earn_usd + (earn.amount_usd or 0) %} {% set totals.earn_zwg = totals.earn_zwg + (earn.amount_zwg or 0) %} {% else %} {% endif %} {# Deductions #} {% if i < doc.employee_deductions|length %} {% set ded = doc.employee_deductions[i] %} {% if ded.components == "PAYEE" %} {% set totals.ded_usd = totals.ded_usd + (doc.payee_usd or 0) %} {% set totals.ded_zwg = totals.ded_zwg + (doc.payee_zwg or 0) %} {% elif ded.components == "Aids Levy" %} {% set totals.ded_usd = totals.ded_usd + (doc.aids_levy_usd or 0) %} {% set totals.ded_zwg = totals.ded_zwg + (doc.aids_levy_zwg or 0) %} {% else %} {% if ded.components in ["CIMAS", "MEDICAL AID", "MEDICAL AID EXPENSE"] and doc.cimas_employee_ == 0 %} {# Do not add to totals because employer pays 100% #} {% else %} {% set totals.ded_usd = (totals.ded_usd + (ded.amount_usd or 0)) | round(2, 'common') %} {% set totals.ded_zwg = (totals.ded_zwg + (ded.amount_zwg or 0)) | round(2, 'common') %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% else %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {# Total row #}
